_comment: Example data for capability-matrix template. Fictional 'capability -> proof point' matrix, 6 rows, 2 columns. Replace with your actual capabilities and evidence citations when authoring a real proposal graphic.
title: Capability → Proof Point Map
subtitle: Every commitment in this proposal traces to deployed evidence or peer-reviewed research

cells: Deployed across three operational units under a government pilot — operational today
Published research: small on-device model matches or exceeds a leading cloud model on domain benchmarks at 95%+ statistical significance
Five production role-specific adapters shipped across distinct operational domains
Multi-platform deployment (laptops, edge servers, fly-away kits)
Active deployments spanning a training schoolhouse and a conventional force command
First-of-its-kind domain benchmark — peer-reviewed, established baseline for the field
Marketplace 'Awardable' status + SAM.gov active (CAGE [CAGE code] / UEI [UEI])

footer.tagline: Every capability cited, every claim backed by deployed evidence or peer-reviewed research
